query_title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mutant Mayhem

recommendations.title: Promare
recommendations.overview: Galo and the Burning Rescue Fire Department face off against BURNISH, a group of mutants who are able to control and wield flames, and the fire disaster they have unleashed on Earth.

recommendations.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II: The Secret of the Ooze
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Adventure, Action, Comedy, Family
recommendations.overview: The Turtles and the Shredder battle once again, this time for the last cannister of the ooze that created the Turtles, which Shredder wants to create an army of new mutants. Meanwhile Splinter is coming... to a decision.

recommendations.title: First Squad: The Moment of Truth
recommendations.overview: Set during the opening days of World War II on the Eastern Front. Its main cast are a group of Soviet teenagers with extraordinary abilities; the teenagers have been drafted to form a special unit to fight the invading German army. They are opposed b
recommendations.director: Alexey Klimov, Yoshiharu Ashino, Vladimir Zhelezniakov

recommendations.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Movie
recommendations.overview: When a mysterious stranger arrives from the future with a dire warning, Leo is forced to rise and lead his brothers, Raph, Donnie, and Mikey in a fight to save the world from a terrifying alien species.

recommendations.title: Krrish 3
recommendations.overview: Krrish and his father must team up to save the world from a psychokinetic evil man named Kaal and his army of mutants.

recommendations.title: One Piece: Giant Mecha Soldier of Karakuri Castle
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Action, Comedy, Science Fiction, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: The Straw Hats visits an island, known as Mecha Island, where a fisherman sings an old folk song about a Golden Crown. Searching for that mysterious treasure, they find a hidden entrance into the island. The island's leader, Ratchet, impressed with t

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Super: Super Hero
recommendations.overview: The Red Ribbon Army, an evil organization that was once destroyed by Goku in the past, has been reformed by a group of people who have created new and mightier Androids, Gamma 1 and Gamma 2, and seek vengeance against Goku and his family.

recommendations.title: The Last Mimzy
recommendations.overview: Two siblings begin to develop special talents after they find a mysterious box of toys, and soon their parents and even their teacher are drawn into a strange new world – and find a task ahead of them that is far more important than any of them could

recommendations.title: Metropolis
recommendations.overview: In the midst of societal conflict in the futuristic city of Metropolis, Kenichi and his uncle Shunsaku Ban set out to uncover the mystery behind the first human-like robot, Tima.

recommendations.title: Mobile Suit Gundam Hathaway
recommendations.overview: Twelve years after Char's rebellion, Hathaway Noa leads an insurgency against Earth Federation, but meeting an enemy officer and a mysterious woman alters his fate.
